name: Aargauer Rueblitorte
recipeIngredient: 1 dl milk/unpasteurized milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
- Place cake rings on a baking sheet lined with silicone paper
- Wash and peel carrots, then finely grate them
- Sift together flour and baking powder
- Warm the apricot jam
- Heat the fondant with lemon juice in a water bath
Baking:
- Beat softened butter and sugar until light and fluffy
- Gradually add egg yolks to the mixture
- Mix in milk, hazelnuts, and grated carrots into the batter
- Whisk egg whites and sugar until stiff peaks form; alternately fold them into the batter with the flour
- Fill the cake rings and bake at 190°C for 20 minutes (use a skewer test)
- Let cool on a rack before removing from the rings and glazing with apricot jam and white fondant
